articles.title: UDF launches legal offensive against Pranit More and show organisers, moves NHRC over cadaver-related dignity concerns
articles.summary: The United Doctors Front (UDF) has launched legal action against comedian Pranit More and comedy show organisers, issuing a legal notice and filing a petition before the NHRC seeking suo motu cognizance of broader human rights concerns. UDF alleges that certain content undermines the dignity of women, deceased persons, and the medical profession while potentially discouraging body donation.
